common.title: Royal Exchange
common.underDevelopmentDesc: This feature is actively being developed. Please stay tuned!
common.regionRestrictedTitle: Service is currently unavailable in your location
common.regionRestrictedSubtitle: Due to regional restrictions, this service is currently unavailable in your location.
common.regionRestrictedEnglishTitle: Service Not Available In Your Region
common.regionRestrictedEnglishDesc: Due to regional restrictions, this service is currently unavailable in your location.
common.featureNotAvailable: Not yet available, for demonstration and simulation only. Stay tuned!
common.noticeCenterDesc: Get the latest platform announcements and activity updates.
common.noticeLoadFailed: Failed to load announcements. Please try again later.
common.noAnnouncementsDesc: There are no available announcements right now.
common.noticeDetailLoadFailed: Announcement does not exist or is temporarily unavailable.
common.noticeNotFoundDesc: The announcement you are looking for does not exist.
common.helpCenterSubtitle: Find help for accounts, identity verification, deposits, withdrawals, trading, security, and platform policies.
common.helpSearchPlaceholder: Search help content, keywords, or article titles
common.helpNoResults: No matching help articles found. Try another keyword.
common.helpAccountCreateContent: Create an account with a valid email address or phone number and set a secure password. You can complete identity verification later to unlock more features.
common.helpAccountLoginContent: Log in with the email, phone number, and password used during registration. If you forget your password, use password recovery to reset it.
common.helpAccountSecurityContent: Enable two-factor authentication, update your password regularly, and avoid logging in on unsafe networks.
common.helpAccountKycContent: KYC is an identity verification process used to confirm user identity and support risk controls for key actions such as trading and withdrawals.
common.helpTradingSpotContent: Spot trading lets buyers and sellers exchange assets at the current market price.
common.helpTradingFuturesContent: Futures trading lets users trade based on future price movements. Please use it carefully after understanding the risks.
common.helpTradingOrderContent: On the trading page, select a pair, enter price and quantity, choose the order type, then submit a buy or sell order.
common.helpTradingFeesContent: Trading fees depend on user level, product type, and execution details. Final fees are shown in filled order records.
common.helpDepositCryptoContent: Open the asset page, choose Deposit, select a coin, copy the deposit address, and transfer from an external wallet or platform.
common.helpWithdrawCryptoContent: Open the asset page, choose Withdraw, enter the withdrawal address and amount, then complete security verification and submit.
common.helpDepositFiatContent: If fiat deposit is available, the deposit page will show supported payment methods and processing requirements.
common.helpWithdrawFiatContent: If fiat withdrawal is available, follow the page instructions to complete verification and confirm withdrawal details.
common.helpSecurity2faContent: Go to Security Center and follow the prompts to bind an authenticator or phone verification method.
common.helpSecurityPasswordContent: Click Forgot Password on the login page and reset your password through email or phone verification.
common.helpSecurityPhishingContent: Make sure you visit the official website, avoid suspicious links, and never share private keys, passwords, or verification codes.
common.helpSecurityAlertContent: Manage login, withdrawal, and other key operation alerts in Security Center to detect abnormal activity quickly.
common.helpApiCreateTitle: How to create an API key
common.helpApiCreateContent: Create a key on the API management page and set permissions and IP allowlists based on your needs.
common.helpApiDocsContent: API documentation includes available endpoints, parameters, and examples for automated trading or system integration.
common.helpApiSecurityContent: Limit API permissions, configure IP allowlists, rotate keys regularly, and avoid exposing keys in client-side code.
common.helpApiLimitContent: API request frequency may be limited by account level and endpoint type. Exceeding limits can cause request failures.
common.helpPlatformRiskContent: Digital asset trading involves risk. Please understand product rules and operate carefully.
common.helpPlatformTermsContent: Using platform services means you agree to follow platform terms and related rules.
common.helpPlatformPrivacyContent: The platform values user privacy and protects personal information according to the privacy policy.
common.helpPlatformComplianceContent: The platform follows applicable laws and continuously improves compliance and risk controls.
common.helpPlatformFeesContent: Service fees are subject to page display and actual execution records.
common.helpWarmTipsContent: If you have any questions, contact the support team anytime.
common.helpHotResetPassword: How do I reset my password?
common.helpHotEnable2fa: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
common.faqRegisterQuestion: How do I register an account?
common.faqRegisterAnswer1: Click the Register button in the top-right corner
common.faqDepositAnswer1: Log in and open the Asset page
common.faqDepositAnswer2: Select the coin you want to deposit
common.faqDepositAnswer3: Copy the deposit address or scan the QR code
common.faqDepositAnswer4: Transfer from your external wallet to that address
common.faqDepositAnswer5: Funds will be credited after blockchain confirmation
common.faqWithdrawAnswer1: Log in and open the Asset page
common.faqWithdrawAnswer4: Enter the withdrawal address and amount
common.faqWithdrawAnswer5: Enter fund password and verification code
common.faqWithdrawAnswer6: Submit the withdrawal request and wait for review
common.faqForgotPasswordQuestion: What if I forgot my password?
common.faqForgotPasswordAnswer1: Click Forgot Password on the login page
common.faqForgotPasswordAnswer4: Reset your password following the email instructions
common.institutionSubtitle: Professional, efficient, and secure digital asset trading services for global institutions
common.institutionIntroDesc1: We provide comprehensive digital asset trading solutions for global institutions, including spot trading, derivatives trading, liquidity management, and risk control services.
common.institutionIntroDesc2: Whether you are a hedge fund, market maker, broker, or other financial institution, we can provide tailored solutions to help you compete in digital asset markets.
common.institutionCtaDesc: Contact our institutional services team to learn more about services and partnership opportunities. We will contact you within 24 hours.
common.institutionServiceTradingDesc: Customized trading solutions for institutions, including high-frequency trading, algorithmic trading, and block trade support.
common.institutionServiceFeeDesc: Competitive fee rates for institutions, with better discounts for higher trading volume.
common.institutionServiceApiDesc: Complete API documentation and technical support to help institutions integrate trading systems quickly.
common.institutionServiceManagerDesc: Dedicated account manager support for institutional clients.
common.institutionServiceRiskDesc: Professional risk assessment and control services to help institutions manage trading risk.
common.institutionServiceLiquidityDesc: Sufficient liquidity support to help institutions trade smoothly in different market conditions.
common.institutionAdvantageSecurityDesc: Multi-layer security protections safeguard client assets and trading data.
common.institutionAdvantagePerformanceDesc: Advanced trading engine supports high-concurrency processing for stable execution.
common.institutionAdvantageTeamDesc: Experienced fintech professionals provide comprehensive technical and service support.
common.institutionAdvantageGlobalDesc: Support for multiple markets and products to meet diverse institutional trading needs.
common.institutionStepApplyDesc: Complete the institutional client application form and submit qualification documents.
common.institutionStepReviewDesc: Our team reviews your materials and confirms qualification and compliance requirements.
common.institutionStepOnboardingDesc: After approval, we open an institutional account and provide API integration support.
common.institutionStepTradeDesc: After onboarding, you can use institutional-grade trading services.
common.searchPlaceholder: Search for assets, markets, and more
common.appDownloadSubtitle: Scan to download the Android or iOS app
common.appQrNotConfigured: Download QR codes are not configured yet
common.aboutPageError: Failed to load page content. Please try again later.
common.aboutPagePartialContent: Some sections are not configured yet.

common.legalPageEmpty: No page content is available yet.

asset.spotAccountDesc: Used for spot trading. Transfer funds to the spot account before placing orders.
asset.spotAssetsDesc: Spot account assets can be used directly for spot trading. After deposits arrive, transfer funds from the funding account to the spot account first.
asset.contractAccountDesc: Used for futures trading. Transfer margin before opening positions.
asset.accountDistributionDesc: Shows funds across accounts using the current USDT basis.
asset.assetDistributionDesc: Shows holdings by current asset quantity.
asset.contractAccountSummaryDesc: Shows USDT summary for the futures margin account.
asset.accountBalanceSummaryDesc: Summarizes available and frozen balances by coin for the current account.

asset.stockTokenLocksNoticeContent:
1. Complete registration on the Keynes Securities platform (search for Keynes Securities in your mobile app store)
2. Contact the exchange's official customer support. Please use the official announcements or support page as the source of contact details
3. Confirm the related stock allocation arrangements
asset.convertNotice: After conversion, the amount will be deducted from convertible equity and {symbol} will be credited to the spot account. This action cannot be undone.
asset.convertFailed: Conversion failed. Please try again later.
asset.assetDepositTheSelectedCoinDoesNotSuppor: The selected coin does not support deposit yet.
asset.assetDepositSelectCoinNetworkThenClickGe: Select coin & network, then click “Get address”.
asset.assetDepositHowToDepositDesc: Select the coin and network, then click Get address. Copy the address or scan the QR code and transfer from an external wallet or platform using the same network. Always check the coin, network, and Memo / Tag details.
asset.assetDepositDepositNotArrivedDesc: First confirm the on-chain transaction is complete and meets the platform crediting requirements, then check the coin, network, address, and TxID. If it still has not arrived, contact support with the TxID for assistance.
asset.assetDepositWrongNetworkDepositDesc: Different networks have different address and asset rules. A deposit sent on the wrong network may not be credited automatically. Do not submit repeated requests; keep the TxID and contact support to check whether manual handling is possible.
asset.assetDepositSelectCoinNetworkToViewRecor: Select coin & network to view records.

asset.withdrawVerificationDesc: Confirm the withdrawal details and complete security verification.
asset.withdrawCrossDeviceConfirmDesc: Make sure your device and browser are secure. Avoid phishing links and unknown plugins.
asset.withdrawFaqPendingTitle: Why is my withdrawal under review?
asset.withdrawFaqPendingDesc: Some withdrawals require manual risk review. Please wait until the review is complete.
asset.withdrawFaqWhitelistTitle: How do I set an address whitelist?
asset.withdrawFaqWhitelistDesc: Manage withdrawal address whitelists in security settings. New entries take effect according to platform security rules.
asset.withdrawFaqAddressTitle: What if I entered the wrong withdrawal address?
asset.withdrawFaqAddressDesc: Always check the coin, network, and withdrawal address before submitting. Once an on-chain withdrawal is submitted or broadcast, it usually cannot be reversed. If you notice an incorrect address, contact support as soon as possible with the withdrawal record details.
asset.withdrawFaqNetworkTitle: Why can I not withdraw after selecting a network?
asset.withdrawFaqNetworkDesc: Make sure the coin and network support withdrawals and that your funding account has enough available balance.
asset.withdrawStatusReviewingMessage: This withdrawal is waiting for manual review
asset.withdrawStatusVerifyingMessage: Please complete email verification code verification
asset.withdrawStatusFrozenMessage: Funds are frozen. Submit the on-chain transfer or cancel to release them.
asset.withdrawStatusProcessingMessage: The system is processing your request

opportunities.title: Trading Opportunities

opportunities.ethPullbackDesc: ETH/USDT has encountered resistance and is expected to pull back.
opportunities.bnbRangeDesc: BNB/USDT is trading in a narrow range, suitable for high selling and low buying.

user.title: User Center
user.passwordDesc: It is recommended to change your password regularly to ensure account security
user.enableGoogleAuth: Enabling Google Authenticator can improve account security
user.realNameDesc: Complete real name verification to unlock more features
user.advancedDesc: Complete advanced verification to increase withdrawal limit
user.vipDesc: Currently a regular user, upgrade to VIP for lower fees
user.apiKeyDesc: Create and manage your API keys for automated trading and third-party service integration
user.apiDocDesc: View the complete API documentation to learn how to use the API for trading and queries
user.securityDesc: Your account security settings need to be improved to enhance security and smooth access
user.identityDesc: Complete identity verification to unlock all features
user.feeSystemDesc: Royal Exchange platform adopts a tiered fee system, automatically adjusting trading fees based on your trading volume and holdings.
user.apiServiceDesc: Royal Exchange provides API services, allowing you to trade, query market information, and perform other operations through APIs.
user.featureComingSoonDesc: We are working hard to bring you this feature. Please check back later.
user.supportTicketsDesc: Submit issues, view support replies, and follow up on your ticket history.
user.supportTicketCreateDesc: Describe the issue, account, transaction, or on-chain information as clearly as possible.
user.supportTicketSubmittedNotice: Ticket submitted. Support will handle it as soon as possible.
user.supportTicketLoadFailed: Failed to load tickets. Please try again later.
user.supportTicketDetailLoadFailed: Failed to load ticket details. Please try again later.

user.supportTicketReplySubmitFailed: Submission failed. Closed tickets cannot be replied to.
user.supportTicketCloseFailed: Failed to close the ticket. Please try again later.

user.supportTicketReplyPlaceholder: Supplement the issue or reply to support
user.supportTicketClosedHint: This ticket is closed. Please submit a new support ticket if you need further help.
user.supportTicketSelectOrCreate: Select a ticket on the left, or submit a new support ticket.
user.changeLoginPasswordDesc: Use your new password the next time you log in.

user.inviteRuleShareDesc: After your friend registers and generates trading fees, you can receive a {percent}% regular invite commission.
user.inviteRuleRewardDesc: Regular invite commissions are recorded as RCB rewards and credited to the inviter's funding account after payout.
user.inviteRuleBindingDesc: Invite relationships are bound only at registration. Each user can bind one inviter and cannot change it later.
user.inviteCodeGenerating: Invite code is being generated. Please refresh later.
user.inviteLinkDesc: After your friend registers through this link and trades, you can receive a {percent}% fee commission paid in RCB.
user.inviteStatsLoadFailed: Failed to load invite stats. Please refresh later.
user.inviteHeroDesc: After your friend registers and trades, you can receive a {percent}% fee commission paid in RCB.
user.inviteGuestDesc: After registration, you will receive your own invite link. Share it with friends to earn regular invite commissions after they trade.
user.alreadyHaveAccountLogin: Already have an account? Log in
user.inviteTipCodeLink: Links with invite codes guide new users to registration first.
user.inviteTipLoggedIn: Logged-in users only see their own invite link and invite data.
user.inviteTipRcbRecord: Commissions generated from friend trading fees are recorded in RCB.
user.inviteTipActualRecord: Invite rewards are subject to the actual regular invite commission records generated.
user.vipHeroDesc: View your current VIP and SVIP levels, spot fee benefits, RCB holdings and lock status, and level rules.
user.vipHeroHighlightDynamicDesc: Shown based on 30-day trading volume and unlocked RCB holdings.
user.vipHeroHighlightSvipDesc: Shown based on RCB lock amount, lock period, quota limits, and dividend rate.
user.vipHeroHighlightFeeDesc: The system displays the final available spot Maker / Taker fee for your current effective level.
user.vipRuleCycleDesc: VIP levels are calculated from 30-day trading volume, unlocked RCB holdings, and other conditions, and update with account data.
user.vipRuleSpotFeeDesc: Different VIP levels have different spot Maker / Taker fees. The current effective level determines the final fee.
user.vipRuleRcbHoldDesc: Some VIP levels require available RCB holdings. Locked amounts are not counted as unlocked holdings.
user.svipRuleLockLevelDesc: SVIP levels are shown based on RCB lock amount, lock period, quota limits, and other conditions.
user.svipRuleLockPeriodDesc: Higher SVIP levels may require longer lock periods. The page shows available periods by target level.
user.svipRuleDividendDesc: After meeting SVIP conditions, you can view the corresponding dividend rate. Actual benefits are subject to final platform settlement and rules.
user.vipDataLoadFailed: Failed to load membership data. Please try again later.
user.vipLoginExpiredNotice: Your login has expired. Please log in again to view your current 30-day volume, RCB holdings, and membership level.
user.vipAnonymousNotice: When logged out, only VIP / SVIP level rules are shown. Log in to view your current 30-day volume, RCB holdings, and membership level.
user.vipDynamicLevelSystemDesc: VIP levels are shown based on 30-day trading volume, unlocked RCB holdings, and other conditions.
user.vipRulesSubtitle: VIP levels are shown based on 30-day trading volume, unlocked RCB holdings, and other conditions. The final level is based on calculation results.
user.svipStaticLevelSystemDesc: SVIP levels are shown based on RCB lock amount, lock period, quota limits, dividend rate, and other conditions.
user.svipRulesSubtitle: SVIP levels are shown based on RCB lock amount, lock period, quota limits, dividend rate, and other conditions. The final level is based on calculation results.
user.vipFeeNotice: When both VIP and SVIP conditions are met, the system displays the fee benefits for the current effective level. Final fees are subject to actual order settlement.
user.vipCurrentStatusDesc: View your current VIP level, fee source, and 30-day volume.
user.svipCurrentStatusDesc: View your current SVIP level, locked amount, and benefits.

user.kycFaqWhyAnswer: Identity verification protects account security and supports risk controls for key actions such as trading and withdrawals.
user.kycFaqReviewQuestion: How long does review usually take?
user.kycFaqReviewAnswer: Reviews are usually completed within 1-3 business days after submission. Timing depends on document clarity and the review queue.
user.kycFaqIdAnswer: Passport, ID card / national ID, and driver license are currently supported.
user.kycFaqRejectedQuestion: What should I do if my documents are rejected?
user.kycFaqRejectedAnswer: Check the rejection reason, then upload clear, complete documents matching your information and submit again.

user.affiliatePageDesc: This public BD affiliate page explains partner levels, commission rates, and the application path. After logging in, you can submit an application or manage your team from the user center.
user.affiliateLevelPersonalDesc: For individual content promotion, community operations, and small-scale user growth.
user.affiliateLevelTeamDesc: For partners with active trading communities or promotion teams.
user.affiliateLevelInstitutionDesc: For institutions, channels, and large communities. Higher rates are available after review.
user.affiliateBenefitPublicDesc: Guests can view BD cooperation rules, levels, and application steps before logging in.
user.affiliateBenefitCommissionDesc: After becoming a BD, view team size, total commission, pending commission, and paid commission in the user center.
user.affiliateBenefitReviewDesc: After submission, the platform reviews the application and activates the corresponding BD role and commission rate.
user.affiliateLevelSectionDesc: BD1 / BD2 / BD3 all require an application. Final level and commission rate depend on platform approval.
user.affiliateDepositDesc: The deposit is not directly deducted or frozen on this public page. After submitting a BD application, the platform will confirm the deposit method with you according to the review result.
user.affiliateActionLoginApply: Log in to apply for BD
user.affiliateCalculatorDesc: Enter expected invited users and average daily fee per user to estimate daily, monthly, and yearly promotion commission. Results are for display only and do not write to the database or call backend APIs.
user.affiliateCalculatorDailyFee: Average daily fee per user USDT
user.affiliateCtaTitle: Ready to start an affiliate partnership?
user.affiliateCtaDesc: After submission, the platform will review your promotion resources, team size, and cooperation model. Once approved, you will receive a dedicated invite code and invite link.
user.affiliateExampleDesc: Here is a simple example to help you understand how promotion commission is generated. It is for illustration only; actual earnings depend on real trading fees and approved platform level.
user.affiliateHeroDesc: After becoming a BD affiliate, you receive a dedicated invite code and invite link. When invited friends generate trading fees, the system creates commission records and pays eligible commission automatically.
user.affiliateRightRateValue: Based on approved level, up to 50%
user.affiliateRightToolsValue: Dedicated invite code and invite link
user.affiliateRightDesc: After approval, you receive a dedicated invite code and invite link. Team data and commission records can be viewed in the user center in real time.
user.bdHeroTitle: BD Affiliate Partnership and Team Management
user.bdHeroDesc: This page shows BD identity status, application review, team data, commission rates, and commission records.
user.bdDisabledDesc: No new BD commissions are generated while disabled. Historical commission records are retained.
user.bdPayoutFlow: Handled according to the existing BD payout process
user.bdApplyReviewDesc: After submitting a BD application, the platform will review it. Once approved, the corresponding BD identity is enabled and team and commission data will be shown.
user.bdApplyTitle: Apply to Become a BD Affiliate
user.bdApplyDesc: After submission, the platform confirms the BD level, commission rate, and deposit handling method according to the review result.
user.bdStatusPendingHint: The BD application has been submitted and is under review. Review is usually completed within 1-3 business days.
user.bdStatusApprovedHint: The BD application has been approved. The platform will enable the corresponding BD identity.
user.bdStatusRejectedHint: The BD application was not approved. You can adjust and resubmit according to platform feedback.
user.bdStatusCanceledHint: The BD application has been canceled. You can resubmit if you want to continue cooperation.
user.bdLevelBd3Desc: For institutions or channel partners, 50% commission rate.
user.bdDepositNotice: The deposit will not be directly deducted or frozen on this page. After submission, the platform will confirm the deposit method with you according to the review result.
user.bdApplyRemarkPlaceholder: You can enter team size, promotion resources, or contact information
user.bdStatsPaidAmountsHint: BD commission credited balance logs grouped by asset

committee.title: Royal Exchange Crypto Finance Expert Committee
committee.introLine1: A Global Governance & Advisory Framework for Digital Finance
committee.introLine2: Established to support the compliant, sustainable, and globally coordinated development of digital finance, crypto assets, and related capital market activities

members.name: John M. Probandt
members.bio:
John M. Probandt is an experienced chairman and board member with nearly 50 years of professional experience across the United States, Asia, the Middle East, and Africa, with a particular focus on banking, private equity, and venture capital.

He previously served as a senior executive at Morgan Stanley, Dean Witter Reynolds, and Kemper Securities. Since 2003, he has been the incumbent Chairman of an investment banking division of CITIC Group, a trillion-dollar Chinese state-owned conglomerate. He is also an Executive Director of Nev World and Goldenport Enterprises, holds positions in multiple investment vehicles.

Mr. Probandt is a published author and an accomplished public speaker, with expertise spanning investments, finance, and blockchain.

members.name: Professor Sverker Littorin
members.bio:
Professor Sverker Littorin is a senior Nordic strategic figure operating at the intersection of the Swedish Royal establishment,Sällskapet, national governance structures, and Nordic capital markets.

A recognized member of Sweden’s traditional elite system, he has held board and advisory roles within institutions closely associated with the Swedish Royal sphere, reflecting a high level of trust and institutional recognition.

His career spans public governance, listed-company board leadership, and international affairs, where he is known for shaping governance frameworks and long-term strategic direction.

members.name: Professor Negoslav P. Ostojic
members.bio:
Professor Negoslav P. Ostojić is the Executive Director of the European Center for Peace and Development (ECPD), an international institution operating within the framework of the United Nations University for Peace.

A senior scholar in international economics and development, he promotes global academic cooperation and dialogue on peace and human security.

He is a recipient of the Gusi Peace Prize and a member of several distinguished international academic institutions.

members.name: Dr. Brian C. T. Beckham
members.bio:
Dr. Brian C. T. Beckham is a seasoned expert in international affairs, public governance, and diplomatic coordination, with extensive experience across intergovernmental organizations and global institutions.

He currently serves as Special Representative to the United States for the European Center for Peace and Development (ECPD), a United Nations–mandated University for Peace within the UN academic system.

Throughout his career, Dr. Beckham has held senior positions within UN-recognized intergovernmental organizations, contributing to transatlantic dialogue, multilateral cooperation, and international policy coordination.

In recognition of his lifelong dedication to public service and international cooperation, he was awarded the President's Lifetime Achievement Award in 2018 and has received numerous international honors and chivalric distinctions.

members.name: Alfredo Jefferson
members.bio:
Alfredo Jefferson is a senior international development expert and policy advisor with decades of experience across the United Nations system and global public affairs.

He served for over twenty years with the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP), holding senior leadership and advisory roles at country, regional, and headquarters levels, including Deputy Resident Representative, Acting Resident Representative, Regional Coordinator, and Senior Advisor. Throughout his UN career, he provided strategic policy advice to governments, foreign ministries, and senior decision-makers across Africa, Latin America, the Caribbean, and the Asia-Pacific region. His work spanned development finance, resource mobilization, South-South cooperation, governance reform, and crisis response, overseeing and supporting large-scale international programs and multi-billion-dollar funding frameworks.

In recent years, Mr. Jefferson has continued to advise UN agencies and governments as an international development consultant, maintaining strong influence in diplomacy, public policy, and multilateral cooperation.

members.name: Professor Linjie Chou
members.bio:
Professor Zanadu is a Research Fellow at the European Center for Peace and Development (ECPD), where he lectures on global strategic affairs and directs Euro-Asia cooperation initiatives. He is also a Visiting Professor at the Federal University of Rio.

He is widely recognized for his independent, non-mainstream geopolitical analysis, offering deep insights into international diplomacy, great-power competition, and the hidden forces shaping global order. His current research focuses on race and ethnicity as core determinants of international relations.

members.name: Ali Rashid
members.bio:
Mr. Ali Rashid is a senior business and financial leader in the United Arab Emirates.

He serves as Vice Chairman of Mashreq Bank, one of the UAE’s leading commercial banks, and is a Board Member of Dubai World, the government-owned global investment holding group.

He previously served as Chairman of Nakheel PJSC, overseeing landmark real estate developments including the Palm Islands.

Mr. Rashid holds a degree in Civil Engineering from Clarkson University (USA).

members.name: Yazeed Mohamed Al-Rajhi
members.bio:
Yazeed Mohamed Al-Rajhi is a leading Saudi business and financial figure and a member of the founding family of Al Rajhi Bank, the Kingdom’s largest Islamic bank.

As a Board and Governance Committee member, he plays a key role in long-term financial strategy and institutional governance.

He also leads diversified investments through Rajhi Invest, spanning banking, industry, tourism, real estate, and global assets, and has been directly involved in multi-billion-dollar national strategic transactions alongside Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund (PIF).

members.name: George Jensen
members.bio:
George Jensen is a veteran American entrepreneur and private equity partner with more than 30 years of leadership experience across technology and capital markets.

He is a Partner at Black Eagle Partners and a Co-Founder and former CEO of USA Technologies (NASDAQ: USAT), which he led from inception to public listing.

Widely recognized for building and scaling public companies, Jensen is known for his ability to bridge innovation, finance, and long-term value creation.

members.name: Shelly Kraft
members.bio:
Shelly Kraft is a veteran Wall Street financial expert with over 30 years of experience in investment banking, securities markets, and financial media.

He is the Founder, Chairman, and CEO of SNN Incorporated (StockNewsNow), a leading platform for micro-cap market intelligence and public-company investor communication.

Kraft is widely recognized as a key bridge between U.S. public companies and the global investment community.

members.name: Tim Crown
members.bio:
Tim Crown is a prominent American technology entrepreneur and capital markets leader, best known as the co-founder and former Chairman of Insight Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: NSIT). He played a central role in building the company from an early-stage venture into a global, publicly listed IT solutions and services provider with multi-billion-dollar annual revenues.

Under his strategic leadership, Insight Enterprises expanded across more than twenty countries, delivering enterprise-grade IT infrastructure, cloud, software, and digital transformation solutions to organizations worldwide.

Crown is widely recognized for his ability to scale technology businesses, align innovation with commercial execution, and navigate complex capital markets. Beyond his public-company experience, he is an active technology investor and advisor, focusing on transformative business models at the intersection of technology, and long-term value creation.

members.name: Ron Suber
members.bio:
Ron Suber is a globally recognized leader in financial technology and a pioneer of the U.S. peer-to-peer lending industry. He served as President of Prosper, where he led the platform’s transformation into a regulated, institutionally backed fintech leader, helping bring P2P lending into the mainstream financial system.

With over 20 years of experience across banking, consumer finance, and fintech, Ron Suber is widely respected for advancing financial innovation within regulatory frameworks. He is also a key driving force behind LendIt, the world’s largest fintech and online lending conference series.

members.name: Dr. David Sans
members.bio:
Dr. David Sans is President and Senior Partner of D.Boral / EF Hutton Healthcare, overseeing healthcare-related transactions and capital markets initiatives.

On January 17, 2025, he led the successful issuance of the $TRUMP token, generating significant global attention. He previously worked at Pfizer on the commercialization of Rebif® and Macugen®, and served as a Senior Medical Scientist at Novartis, contributing to the launch of Glivec® (Imatinib).

His career also includes executive roles at ImClone Systems and Mount Sinai Health System, where he advanced strategic partnerships with Philips, LabCorp, and Agilent.

members.name: Oleg Viktorovich Zhokhov
members.bio:
Oleg Viktorovich Zhokhov is an international entrepreneur operating at the intersection of urban infrastructure, heavy-asset industries, and crypto-financial innovation.

With an engineering background rooted in the former Soviet industrial system, he has led large-scale municipal solid waste, landfill, and recycling operations, building strong execution and commercial expertise in highly regulated, capital intensive environments.

He is the driving force behind ASGARD, a decentralized environmental governance platform that applies blockchain and crypto-economic mechanisms to global environmental and infrastructure challenges. By connecting real-world assets, long-term project cash flows, and decentralized finance, Zhokhov has positioned ASGARD as a credible bridge between traditional industry and the emerging crypto economy.
